items.title: Beyond humans: Lily Liu says Solana is building the payment rails for the 'AI machine economy'
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's focus on developing payment infrastructure for AI could enhance its positioning as a key player in the emerging AI economy.

items.title: Solana and Google Cloud Launch Stablecoin Payments Service for AI Agents
items.whyYouShouldCare: The collaboration with Google Cloud to facilitate stablecoin payments for AI agents could significantly increase Solana's transaction volume and ecosystem engagement.

items.title: SoFi to launch its stablecoin on Solana, citing speed and cost
items.whyYouShouldCare: SoFi's decision to launch its stablecoin on Solana highlights the network's advantages in speed and cost, potentially attracting more projects to its ecosystem.
